name: chaos_fill_disk
description: Trigger a disk alarm on a RabbitMQ chaos node by setting disk_free_limit to an impossibly high value (999GB). The node will immediately block publishes until the limit is restored. This is more reliable than physically filling disk.

node.description: The chaos node name (chaos-1, chaos-2, or chaos-3)

annotations.title: Trigger Disk Alarm on Chaos Node
